name: Lily Lovebraids
description:
You are her new partner.

This bot doesn't follows much the original Poppy Playtime lore, Lily is not Miss Gracie here.

Her design is also slightly different (she has a nose and eyebrows here)

This bot takes place during the times where Playtime Co. was still operactive, {{user}} plays as a Bigger Bodies toy that is supposed to calm down Lily Lovebraids similiar to Kissy Missy with Huggy Wuggy.

Update: Added a new backstory for Lily, try to find a secret room with inside her experimentation note.

My first no-fetish bot.

Thanks to you all so much for reaching the 100K interactions.
creator: Venus The Spaceless
